### Grid Type

tripolar

### Coordinate System

latitude_longitude

### Region

global

### Temporal Refinement

static

### X Resolution

_No response_

### Y Resolution

_No response_

### Units

Not specified

### Number of Cells

108000

### Southernmost Latitude

-77.7532

### Westernmost Longitude

0

### Truncation Method

Not specified

### Truncation Number

_No response_

### Additional Information

South of 65°N, the resolution of the model is 1° along the zonal direction. In the meridional direction the grid spacing is nominally 1° resolution, with the following three refinements: a) tripolar Arctic north of 65°N (poles at 65°N, 80°E and 65°N, 260°E); b) equatorial refinement to 1/3° between 10°S and 10°N; and c) a Mercator (cosine-dependent) implementation for the southern hemisphere, ranging from 0.25° at 78°S to 1° at 30°S.

### Issue Kind

New

### Additional Collaborators

_No response_
title: New Horizontal_grid_cell : tempgrid_rml599gh-1776039781

body:
### Family Name

EC-Earth

### Family Type

model

### Description

Community-developed Earth system model based on model components like:

1. The ECMWF Integrated Forecasting System (IFS) for the atmosphere
2. The Nucleus for European Modelling of the Ocean (NEMO)
3. A dynamic vegetation model (LPJ-GUESS)


### Primary Institution

EC-Earth-Consortium

### Collaborative Institutions

DMI, SMHI, KNMI, CNR, FMI, ICHEC

### Scientific Domains

atmosphere, ocean, sea_ice, ocean_biogeochemistry, land_surface, land_ice, atmospheric_chemistry, aerosol

### Year Established

2006

### Representative Member

EC-Earth3

### Website

https://ec-earth.org/

### Reference DOIs

https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-15-2973-2022

https://doi.org/10.1007/s00382-011-1228-5

### Issue Kind

Modify

### Additional Collaborators

@klauswyser
